scenes.text: In this lecture, we will explore Docker, a powerful tool used for containerization, enabling developers to package applications with all their dependencies into a standardized unit for software development. We will cover key concepts such as Docker images, containers, Dockerfile, and Docker Hub. You'll learn how these components work together to streamline the development process, ensure consistency across environments, and enhance scalability.
scenes.image_prompt: graph TD; A[Docker] --> B[Docker Image]; A --> C[Docker Container]; B --> D[Dockerfile]; B --> E[Docker Hub]; C --> F[Code Environment]; D --> G[Instructions]; E --> H[Registry]; F --> I[Development Consistency]; H --> J[Image Distribution]
